purpose: Define how voiceover, subtitles, and visual scenes are aligned after final TTS audio is generated.
workflow: Generate final TTS audio from voiceover_units.
Read real audio duration and run transcription or forced alignment when available.
Write subtitle_timeline.horizontal.json or subtitle_timeline.vertical.json from real audio timing.
Render video-app from aligned subtitle timeline, not hand-estimated script timing.

fallback_policy.when_forced_alignment_unavailable: Distribute cue durations from real audio duration and mark timing_status as estimated_after_audio_duration_fit.
